body_preview: Objective: Exercise the eval harness end-to-end with a real code patch for the first time. The harness has 368 fixtures and a smoke test proving the pipeline loads, but zero actual evaluations have ever run. Pick one recent, well-understood commit diff (e.g., the Day 99 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY→DEEPSEEK_API_KEY fix in lib.rs, or the reverse-shell false-positive fix
title: Run first real eval through the eval harness
